name: Student Package — 3D2N Bromo & Ijen Blue Fire
description: ISIC student rate for 3-day private Bromo sunrise + Ijen Blue Fire tour from Surabaya. Same safety standards as canonical packages: HPWKI-registered guides, mandatory Ijen health screening (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024), private vehicle and crew. ISIC Provider ID 259268. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.
touristType: International students with verified ISIC card

item.name: Day 1 — Surabaya to Bromo
item.description: Private transfer from Surabaya to Bromo area. Check-in and dinner. Overnight at Bromo-area hotel.

item.name: Day 2 — Bromo Sunrise + Transfer to Bondowoso
item.description: Penanjakan viewpoint for Bromo sunrise over the Tengger caldera. Private 4WD jeep to crater base. Transfer east to Bondowoso. Ijen health screening on arrival (SpO2, blood pressure, heart rate — BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024).

item.name: Day 3 — Ijen Blue Fire Crater + Return
item.description: Midnight departure to Paltuding base. Guided ascent to Kawah Ijen crater rim (2,386 m). Blue Fire observation. Gas masks and trekking poles provided. Descent, breakfast, return to Surabaya.

subjectOf.name: Mount Bromo
subjectOf.description: Active volcano in the Tengger Semeru National Park. Penanjakan sunrise viewpoint and crater base accessed by private 4WD jeep. Elevation 2,329 m.

subjectOf.name: Kawah Ijen
subjectOf.description: Active stratovolcano with the world's largest acidic crater lake and the world's largest visible blue fire phenomenon. Elevation 2,386 m.

offers.description: ISIC student pricing per person: IDR 5,400,000 (solo) · IDR 3,050,000 (2 pax) · IDR 2,850,000 (3) · IDR 2,650,000 (4–5) · IDR 2,450,000 (6–7) · IDR 2,250,000 (8–10) · IDR 2,050,000 (11+). Valid ISIC card required (Provider ID 259268). All-inclusive: private transport, crew, accommodation + breakfast, entrance fees, Bromo jeep, Ijen gas masks, health screening, water, T-shirt.

mainEntity.name: What is the student discount for the 3D2N Bromo & Ijen tour?

acceptedAnswer.text: ISIC-verified students receive reduced pricing starting from IDR 2,050,000/person (11+ group) compared to the standard rate. A valid ISIC card is required — verified at checkout via ISIC Alive Verify API (Provider ID 259268). Expired or unverifiable cards default to standard pricing.

mainEntity.name: Is the student package the same quality as the standard tour?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Only the price differs. Safety standards, vehicle quality, HPWKI-registered guide credentials, and mandatory Ijen health screening are identical to canonical packages. Student pricing exists because JVTO is an official ISIC provider — nothing is removed from the experience.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify my ISIC card for student pricing?

acceptedAnswer.text: JVTO verifies student status at checkout via the ISIC Alive Verify API. You need a currently valid ISIC card with a readable card number. The verification is automated and instant. If verification fails, standard pricing applies. JVTO's ISIC Provider ID is 259268.
